examples: The family believe that it was a locum doctor at their local hospital in Hereford who reported the case to the child protection unit after Hannah had been taken home by her parents.
He used the reference to gain work as a locum in Leicester and the Isle of Wight.
Dr Norlia Abdullah performed the operation at Hereford County Hospital as a locum doctor on 6 February, 2010.
Abdul Pirzada worked as practice nurse in Birmingham for seven years, as a locum GP and physician's assistant.
